CustomField.description: calculate fee amount based on payment amount and insolvency type
CustomField.formula:
IF((Bank_Name__c == 'Scotia Bank' || Bank_Name__c == 'Fairstone') && (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Division 1 Proposal') || ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Consumer Proposal')), Payment_Amount__c * 0.02,
IF((Bank_Name__c == 'Scotia Bank' || Bank_Name__c == 'Fairstone' || Bank_Name__c == 'Goeasy') && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Bankruptcy'), Payment_Amount__c * 0.04,
IF(Bank_Name__c == 'Goeasy' && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Division 1 Proposal'), Payment_Amount__c * 0.02,
IF(Bank_Name__c == 'Goeasy' && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Consumer Proposal'), Payment_Amount__c * 0.025,
IF(Bank_Name__c == 'Canadian Tire' && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Consumer Proposal'), Payment_Amount__c * 0.03,
IF(Bank_Name__c == 'Canadian Tire' && ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Account__r.Insolvency_Type__c, 'Bankruptcy'), Payment_Amount__c * 0.08,
0))))))
CustomField.label: Fee Amount
